title: CAISO Load Forecast DAM JSON API
description:
⚠️ This dataset is deprecated in favor of [CAISO Load Forecast Day Ahead](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/caiso_load_forecast_day_ahead). It is the same dataset from the same source, but includes all "TAC Area Names" rather than only the system area like this dataset. It also includes a slightly more accurate publish time.

---
Load Forecast in 1 hour intervals as reported by CAISO.
